summary: Gym website (Bodyshape Fitness) with member testimonials section

new_feature_requests.summary: Add 'What Our Members Say' testimonials section with 6 member reviews

Update the 'What Our Members Say' testimonials section to display 6 member reviews with the following content: Neil L. (September 2025, 5 stars) praising equipment superiority and Anthony; Sarah M. (August 2025, 5 stars) highlighting 24/7 access and clean equipment; Mike T. (July 2025, 5 stars) mentioning 5+ years membership and great community; Jennifer K. (June 2025, 5 stars) praising clean facility and 24/7 access; David R. (May 2025, 5 stars) noting incredible equipment selection and spotless facility; Amanda P. (April 2025, 5 stars) welcoming staff and modern equipment
